race.description: R & S Gook 72nd Wedding Anniversary Maiden Plate
race.comment: BOLSHIE (1) is a 16-start maiden who could only manage to finish fifth at his latest appearance over 1515m at Sale after he got a long way back in the run, but that race was won by a horse who ran well in last year's VRC Derby and he should be ready to fire third-up. PICK WISELY (3) drifted well back then came with a powerful run to finish 2.5 lengths from the winner in second when resuming last start over 1300m at Ararat. Better for that and will relish the extra trip here, but also gets the chance to settle a little closer. TITAN'S SPIRIT (5) ran an improved race last start, just needs to overcome that wide gate. ADAMANA (7) disappointed last start, but has jumped out well and gets a good gate plus Harry Coffey.
